description_long: This is a bright red baseball cap with a smooth, rounded crown and a wide, flat brim extending from the front. The cap features a circular logo patch on the front, displaying the text 'U 808' in white and gray on a blue background. The surface of the cap appears to be made of a synthetic material, likely polyester or nylon, giving it a slightly glossy finish. The crown is seamless and domed, with no visible ventilation holes or stitching details. The brim is solid and slightly curved, providing shade and structure to the front of the cap. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with fabric and contains air space for comfort.
description: A red baseball cap with a domed crown, wide flat brim, and a 'U 808' logo patch on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'U 808' logo patch centered on the crown above the wide, flat brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, rounded crown and the full extension of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the seamless, domed crown with no visible logo or brim.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the continuous curve of the crown and the brim extending forward.
